data.author: Jonathon Ambarian
data.title: Montana looks at how it licenses professionals
data.description: The Montana Department of Labor and Industry says more than 200,000 Montanans – a third of the state’s workforce – require a state license in order to do their job.

data.title: Prominent surgeon accused of performing unnecessary endometriosis surgeries
data.description: A prominent Melbourne surgeon is under investigation over allegations he performed unnecessary or excessive surgeries on young women.
